hook: A micro-freelance marketplace where Gen-Z sells 15-min skills (resume edits, design feedback) for $5-25.
core_problem: 70M Gen-Z workers want hyperflexible income; Fiverr is too transactional; Upwork is for projects.
ai_leverage: Quality agent verifies skill samples; matching agent connects buyers per turnaround + budget; payment agent settles instantly.
monetization_logic: 15% take rate; instant payout via card.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: micro-skills. Stage 2: full Gen-Z work platform. Stage 3: bundled with finance + tax + insurance.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state worker classification + 1099
unsustainable_unit_economics: take rate + instant payout fee

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Trust + safety reviews disputes; ops verifies new freelancers.

ui_ux_invocation: Buyer says 'I need a TikTok hook in 30 min for $15'; agent finds + delivers.

hook: An on-demand skill bootcamp that pays you back if you land the job in 12 months.
core_problem: 30M Gen-Z workers need skills upgrade; existing bootcamps cost $10-20k upfront; outcomes mixed.
ai_leverage: Curriculum agent personalizes; coaching agent runs daily check-ins; placement agent connects to employers.
monetization_logic: Income share agreement: 8% of salary for 24 months on jobs >$50k.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-student outcome corpus + employer network compounds.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: tech bootcamps. Stage 2: full skill + career OS. Stage 3: bundled with finance + insurance.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: ISA + state education + CFPB consumer credit
unsustainable_unit_economics: ISA aligns ARR to outcomes

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + LMS + employer API
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-student progress, employer outcomes, salary corpus.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Coach reviews student progress weekly; ops verifies employer outcomes.

ui_ux_invocation: Student does daily voice check-in; agent adapts curriculum + coaches.

hook: A dating app safety layer that verifies identity + reduces ghosting + builds reputation.
core_problem: 40M Gen-Z users on dating apps face safety + bad-faith issues; existing apps (Tinder, Hinge) lack reputation.
ai_leverage: Identity-verification agent runs ID + bio checks; reputation agent maintains per-user trust score; intervention agent flags red-flag patterns.
distribution_strategy: PLG via 'verify your match' wedge + community channels.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-user reputation + outcome corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: safety overlay. Stage 2: full Gen-Z relationship + safety platform. Stage 3: bundled with insurance + concierge.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: BIPA + state biometric + CCPA + GDPR
fake_ai_trap: trained reviewers verify any flagged user

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Persona ID
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Trust + safety reviews any flagged escalation.

ui_ux_invocation: User toggles safety; verifications + reputation run in background.

hook: An apartment finder that matches you with a roommate and a place — and signs the lease in one flow.
core_problem: 20M Gen-Z renters relocate annually; finding apartment + roommate + lease is fragmented.
ai_leverage: Lifestyle-matching agent picks roommates; listing agent surfaces apartments; lease agent handles co-signing.
retention_loop: Per-user + per-roommate history compounds for next move.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: apartment + roommate. Stage 2: full Gen-Z relocation + lease OS. Stage 3: bundled with renters insurance + utilities.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: Fair Housing Act + state landlord-tenant
unsustainable_unit_economics: finder + referral keep margin healthy
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for Gen-Z renters + landlords.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: Next.js + Python + Postgres + apartment APIs + DocuSign
technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user lifestyle, apartment listings, lease outcomes.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Compliance reviews any flagged listing; user signs lease.

ui_ux_invocation: User answers lifestyle quiz; agent surfaces 3 roommate + apartment combos.

hook: A paycheck-to-savings autopilot that builds Gen-Z's first $5k cushion without budget guilt.
core_problem: 60% of Gen-Z lives paycheck to paycheck; existing apps (Acorns, Qapital) require manual setup.
ai_leverage: Income + spend agent baselines; savings agent skims optimal % per paycheck; emergency-buffer agent rebalances.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C. Stage 2: full Gen-Z financial OS. Stage 3: bundled with credit + insurance.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state finance + minor banking + ECOA
unsustainable_unit_economics: subscription + interchange

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Node + Postgres + Plaid + Galileo
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves any large transfer; advisor reviews any policy.

ui_ux_invocation: User connects payroll; savings happen silently.

hook: A chat-first mental-health surface that meets Gen-Z where they already vent.
core_problem: 30M Gen-Z face mental-health crisis; therapy access slow; existing chat apps (Wysa, Woebot) lack escalation + trust.
ai_leverage: Coaching agent provides daily support; risk agent escalates to clinician when warranted.
retention_loop: Per-user state corpus + clinical relationship lock.
scalability_rationale: Clinical license footprint gates; software margins after.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C. Stage 2: school + clinical bundle. Stage 3: full Gen-Z mental-health OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA + per-state telehealth + minor consent
fake_ai_trap: licensed clinician reviews every escalation
validation_invocation: Defensible clinical + reimbursement moat; reject vanity DAU.
ui_ux_invocation: User chats freely; agent supports + escalates only when warranted.

hook: An event-ticket drop platform that makes hyperlocal experiences feel like Supreme drops.
core_problem: 30M Gen-Z value experiences > products; events sold on Eventbrite feel transactional; community + scarcity drive value.
ai_leverage: Curation agent picks per-user drops; community agent maintains hype + loyalty.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: hyperlocal events. Stage 2: full Gen-Z experience platform. Stage 3: bundled with travel + finance.
failure_avoidance: unsustainable_unit_economics: marketplace + subscription
commoditization_collapse: community + drop mechanics differentiate
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for Gen-Z + venues + creators.

technical_mvp_sketch.data: Per-user attendance, venue history, community metrics.
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Trust + safety reviews disputes; ops verifies organizers.

ui_ux_invocation: User opens app; agent surfaces 3 drops for tonight.

hook: A thrift-resale intelligence layer that tells Gen-Z what to flip and where for maximum profit.
core_problem: 20M Gen-Z thrift + resell (Depop, Poshmark); pricing + sourcing are guesswork; 80% lose money.
ai_leverage: Pricing agent compares cross-platform listings; sourcing agent maps thrift inventory; logistics agent times shipping for max margin.

moat_potential.rationale: Per-item resale outcome corpus is unique.

billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C. Stage 2: full Gen-Z resale + finance. Stage 3: bundled with marketplace listing + payment.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: state sales tax + 1099-K
unsustainable_unit_economics: subscription + per-sale
validation_invocation: Per-item resale data is asymmetric; platforms see one listing.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Depop/Poshmark APIs
technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: User approves any high-margin listing; ops handles disputes.

ui_ux_invocation: User snaps thrift item; agent prices + suggests platform.

hook: A creator-band collective that lets Gen-Z share fans + revenue across each other's content.
core_problem: 5M Gen-Z creators struggle to grow alone; existing platforms (Patreon, OnlyFans) are individual.
ai_leverage: Matching agent picks complementary creators; revenue agent splits earnings; collaboration agent suggests crossover content.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: micro-collectives. Stage 2: full Gen-Z creator OS. Stage 3: bundled with finance + insurance.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: FTC + per-state creator + tax
unsustainable_unit_economics: take rate + premium tools
validation_invocation: Indispensable infrastructure for Gen-Z creators + fans.

technical_mvp_sketch.hitl: Creators approve every split + collab; ops handles disputes.

ui_ux_invocation: Creator joins collective; agent picks collabs + splits revenue.

hook: A voice journal that turns daily 60s recordings into insights about your patterns + growth.
core_problem: Gen-Z lacks tools for self-reflection; journaling apps require typing; therapy is gated.
ai_leverage: Voice + sentiment agent transcribes + classifies; insight agent surfaces patterns; growth agent suggests next experiments.
retention_loop: Per-user journal corpus lock; multi-year insight compounds.
billion_dollar_path: Stage 1: D2C. Stage 2: bundled with mental-health + clinical. Stage 3: full personal-OS.
failure_avoidance: regulatory_blind_spot: HIPAA-aligned for clinical claims
thin_wrapper_syndrome: own pattern + growth model
validation_invocation: Per-user pattern data is asymmetric; therapy sees weekly snapshots.

technical_mvp_sketch.stack: React Native + Python + Postgres + Whisper + custom NLP

ui_ux_invocation: User records 60s daily; agent surfaces weekly insight.
